scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @rebase/shared build && pnpm --filter @rebase/db build && tsx watch --tsconfig tsconfig.json src/index.ts
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @rebase/shared build && pnpm --filter @rebase/db build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @rebase/shared build && pnpm --filter @rebase/db build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
